ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the workclass category */,
  "fnlwgt" REAL /* Final weight (used in census data) */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the relationship status */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex */,
  "capital_gain" REAL /* Capital gains */,
  "capital_loss" REAL /* Capital losses */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the native country */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment status */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry of employment */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic region of residence */,
  "disability_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disability status */,
  "immigration_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the immigration status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_employment_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_status_id") REFERENCES employment_statuses ("employment_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_disability_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("disability_status_id") REFERENCES disability_statuses ("disability_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_immigration_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("immigration_status_id") REFERENCES immigration_statuses ("immigration_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass category */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the workclass category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Categorization of education level (e.g., High School, Bachelor's) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status category */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the marital status category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation category */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation category */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupations_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship category */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race category */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race category */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic group associated with the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex category */,
  "gender_identity" TEXT /* Gender identity beyond binary male/female */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country category */,
  "native_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country category */,
  "region" TEXT /* Broader region the country belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statuses" (
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "employment_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disability_statuses" (
  "disability_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disability status */,
  "disability_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the disability status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disability_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "immigration_statuses" (
  "immigration_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each immigration status */,
  "immigration_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the immigration status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("immigration_status_id")
)
